data.content: Plan review approved. The 6-step plan correctly targets all 4 primary source files and maps cleanly to all 6 acceptance criteria. Key design decisions validated: (1) agentId-based exclusion identity is correct given pool keying, (2) multi-exclusion Set<string> API is the right abstraction for accumulated failures, (3) removing advanced-mode gate only for failure-retry paths preserves basic-mode normal selection, (4) reset semantics for failure history on queue-type transitions prevent stale exclusions. Test strategy covers the three critical new scenarios (multi-failure rotation, basic-mode retry, early-stop on exhaustion). No invariant violations. Low implementation risk.
